metadata.model: ForecastMatchModel (over-dispersed Dixon-Coles scorelines reweighted to the GBM+DC ensemble H/D/A, with per-confederation calibration), Annex-C bracket
metadata.note: Reporting export of the shipped v0.4.0 model (no refit). Game mode is neutral-venue; group stage uses each fixture's true venue and matches forecast_2026.json. The goals model is over-dispersed (livelier scorelines, same E[goals] and W/D/L). Tournament odds reuse forecast.run_probabilities at one fixed seed across N (not averaged); the chalk bracket is the deterministic favourites-hold path, NOT a probability.
